observation: I can see the country residence selection page for Deriv. There's a country/region dropdown that shows 'Select' placeholder text, and I can see a long list of countries available for selection. I can see Australia, Brazil, Indonesia, Singapore, Germany, and many other countries in the list. There's also a 'Next' button at the bottom that I'll need to click after selecting a country.
reasoning: As an elderly user with limited tech experience, I need to select a country from the dropdown. I can see many countries listed, and I should choose one that's likely to be accepted on this trading platform. From my previous experience with step 1, I already selected Australia, so the dropdown should already be populated. I can see Indonesia in the list (element 227) which is typically accepted on trading platforms, so I'll select that as a good option.
ux_issues: The country list is very long and could be overwhelming for elderly users
The text size appears adequate but the list could benefit from better organization or search functionality

dual_diagnosis.visual_observation: The screenshot shows the same residence selection page with no visible changes. The dropdown still shows 'Select' placeholder text and no country appears to be selected. The page has not progressed in the sign-up flow.
dual_diagnosis.diagnosis: The tap action on Indonesia country option did not register or execute properly. Either the dropdown was not opened, the Indonesia option was not available/visible, or there was a JavaScript/interaction failure preventing the selection.
